CREATE TABLE sample_table (a INT, b INT);
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (x INT, y INT);
SELECT bit_and(a, (SELECT y FROM secondary_table WHERE x = 7)) FROM sample_table;
SELECT bit_and(a, b) AS result FROM sample_table, secondary_table WHERE sample_table.a = secondary_table.x;
SELECT bit_and(bit_and(a, b), (SELECT y FROM secondary_table LIMIT 1)) FROM sample_table;
SELECT (bit_and(a, b) + bit_and(15, 0)) AS combined_result FROM sample_table;
SELECT bit_and(bit_and(a, b), bit_and(255, 240)) AS final_result FROM sample_table;
SELECT CASE WHEN bit_and(a, b) > 0 THEN 'positive' ELSE 'non-positive' END AS status FROM sample_table;
